task: Transfer all large pipette tips from one holder to another holder for large pipette tips
raw:
Scene: large_pipette_tips_holder_1, large_pipette_tips_holder_2, large_pipette_tips, table
Step 1: reach(large_pipette_tips_holder_1)
  affordance_region: the body of large pipette tips holder 1
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, large_pipette_tips_holder_1, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, large_pipette_tips_holder_1) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(large_pipette_tips)
  affordance_region: the top of large pipette tips holder 1
  contact: holding(large_pipette_tips) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(large_pipette_tips)
Step 3: transport(large_pipette_tips -> large_pipette_tips_holder_2)
  affordance_region: an empty area on large pipette tips holder 2
  spatial: above(large_pipette_tips, large_pipette_tips_holder_2, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(large_pipette_tips)
  done_when: above(large_pipette_tips, large_pipette_tips_holder_2, 0.05)
Step 4: place(large_pipette_tips -> large_pipette_tips_holder_2)
  affordance_region: an empty area on large pipette tips holder 2
  contact: surface_contact(large_pipette_tips, large_pipette_tips_holder_2) [completion]; released(large_pipette_tips) [completion]
  pose: stable(large_pipette_tips) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(large_pipette_tips, large_pipette_tips_holder_2) AND released(large_pipette_tips)
<END_OF_PLAN>
